# barracudawaf_vsites (Resource)

`barracudawaf_vsites` manages `Vsite` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_vsites" "demo_vsite" {
    name      = "DemoVsite"
    interface = "WAN"
    active_on = "Unit1"
    comments  = "Vsite created via Terraform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **interface** (String) Interface
- **name** (String) Vsite

### Optional

- **active_on** (String) Active-on
- **comments** (String) Comments
- **id** (String) The ID of this resource.
